office_does: A state representative writes and votes on state laws and budgets, conducts oversight, and represents their legislative district.
race_blurb: A first-time candidate focused on school funding and living costs faces the incumbent House majority floor leader.

candidates.summary: Thompson brings private-sector and volunteer experience and focuses on school funding, living costs, and efficient use of taxes.
highlights: Wants to change the school-funding formula and reduce living costs [S1]
Calls for efficient use of tax dollars [S1]

spending.basis: He emphasizes efficient use of tax dollars while also seeking school-funding changes.

experience.basis: His dossier documents professional and volunteer experience but no elected record.

candidates.summary: Jurado Stonier is the incumbent representative and House majority floor leader, with education and appropriations experience.
highlights: Calls for special-education funding and affordable health care, child care, and housing [S1]
Serves as House majority floor leader [S1]

spending.basis: She supports added public investment in special education and affordability-related services.

experience.basis: She is an incumbent and House majority floor leader with broad committee experience.
